title: IATF website
summary: International Accessibility Task Force-a mipuite hmuh theih website.
problem: IATF chuan model hrilhfiahtu, project târ langtu, leh a dawta hma lâk tûr dikte hriattîrtu public home nghet tak a mamawh a ni.
why: He site hi IATF-a mipuite luhna kawngkhar a ni a. He project hi static project-ah siam a ni bawk a, a chhiarna, lehlin leh enkawl a awlsam hle a ni.
scopeIn: IATF model hrilhfiahtu public landing pages
State, maintainer, repository leh demo neiin IATF project pawm tawh, active leh archived te public registry
English source leh structure lehlin peih tawh
Static deployment chu Cloudflare Workers Static Assets-ah hman theih a ni
scopeOut: Private member area te, account te, a nih loh leh login flows te
Project source code dahkhawmna, project tinte mahni repository-a awm
Project tinte GitHub repository-a awm, project hrang hrang issue tracking

title: IATF selfie
summary: IATF prototype hmasa ber a ni a, natural stop point a thlen hnuah archived a ni.
problem: IATF hnuaiah Accessibility-focused tool zirchianna hmasa ber.
why: Repository chu hnathawh chhinchhiah ang chi a ni a, active development chu tihtawp tawh mah se, mipui hriat theihin a awm reng a ni.
scopeIn: Accessibility-focused tool prototype hmasa ber chu public record-a dah a ni
scopeOut: Active development or feature hna thawk

title: IATF bot
summary: IATF khawtlang bot, natural stop point a thlen hnuah archive a ni.
why: Repository chu hnathawh chhinchhiah ang chi a ni a, active development chu tihtawp tawh mah se, mipui hriat theihin a awm reng a ni.
